evals.prompt: How do I improve NestJS throughput significantly?
evals.expected_output: Switch from Express to FastifyAdapter (2x throughput). Enable Gzip/Brotli compression. Configure Keep-Alive for upstream HTTP connections. Use SINGLETON scope.

evals.prompt: When should I use REQUEST scope in NestJS providers?
evals.expected_output: Avoid unless absolutely necessary. A single REQUEST-scoped provider makes the entire injection chain request-scoped. Use Durable Providers for multi-tenancy instead.

evals.prompt: How do I offload CPU-heavy tasks in NestJS?
evals.expected_output: Use worker_threads for CPU-heavy work (image processing, crypto). Use BullMQ for async task queues. Never block the HTTP event loop with synchronous heavy work.

should_not_trigger: How do I optimize Go HTTP server performance?
How do I implement caching in NestJS?
How do I scale a Spring Boot app?
